title: Origin Realms: Experience
description: A Modpack made by a fan, made to improve your Experience in Origin Realms! (play.originrealms.com)
body:
One day, I was thinking... 
Most OR Modpacks havent been updated for a while or are abandoned, and so I made this, to not only make just another OR Modpack, but to make one that will help with improve performance and that will make the game even fancier- with mods like _Particle Rain_ and _Sound Dynamics_.

Other things you can find in the pack is a menu that is made to focus on Origin Realms, with a new button to join the game and a new layout.
I want to add custom panoramas but I am still figuring out, so any help will be greatly appreciated!
